subtopics.title: Components
subtopics.content:
- **1** compact game board (North America map with 24 cities)
- **24** city cards
- **4** epidemic cards
- **4** role cards with pawns
- **24** disease cubes (3 colors: blue, yellow, red — 8 each)
- **3** cure markers
- **1** infection rate marker
- **1** outbreak marker

subtopics.title: Board Setup
subtopics.content:
1. **Place board** in center.
2. **Set infection rate** marker to first position (2).
3. **Set outbreak** marker to 0.
4. **Shuffle city cards** — Deal initial infections: flip 3 cards at a time, placing 3, 2, then 1 cube on each city drawn.
5. **Prepare player deck** — Shuffle city cards, divide into piles equal to epidemic card count, add 1 epidemic card per pile, stack without shuffling within each pile.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
- **Choose roles** — Each player takes a role card with unique ability.
- **Deal player cards** — 2 players: 4 each, 3 players: 3 each, 4 players: 2 each.
- **Start position** — All players begin in Atlanta.
- **Difficulty** — Use 3-4 epidemic cards based on desired difficulty.

subtopics.title: Game Overview
subtopics.content: Pandemic: Hot Zone is a compact cooperative game. Work together to cure 3 diseases before outbreaks overwhelm North America. A streamlined version of Pandemic designed for quick play.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
Each player's turn:
1. **Take 4 actions** — Move, treat disease, share knowledge, or discover a cure.
2. **Draw 2 player cards** — From the player deck. Resolve epidemics immediately.
3. **Infect cities** — Draw cards equal to the current infection rate and add 1 cube to each city.

subtopics.title: Key Actions
subtopics.content:
#### Actions (4 per turn)
- **Drive/Ferry** — Move to an adjacent connected city.
- **Direct Flight** — Discard a city card to move to that city.
- **Charter Flight** — Discard the card matching your current city to move anywhere.
- **Treat Disease** — Remove 1 disease cube from your current city (all cubes of that color if cured).
- **Share Knowledge** — Give or take a city card matching your current city with another player there.
- **Discover a Cure** — At a research station, discard 4 cards of the same color to cure that disease.

#### Epidemics
- **Increase** — Move infection rate marker up.
- **Infect** — Draw bottom card of infection deck, place 3 cubes on that city.
- **Intensify** — Shuffle infection discard pile, place on top of infection deck.

subtopics.title: Special Rules
subtopics.content:
#### Outbreaks
- If a city would get a 4th cube of one color, an outbreak occurs.
- No 4th cube is placed; instead, each connected city gets +1 cube of that color.
- Chain outbreaks are possible (but each city outbreaks only once per chain).

#### Roles
- Each role has a unique ability (e.g., Medic removes all cubes of one color as 1 action).

#### Research Stations
- Some scenarios have fixed stations; others let players build them.

subtopics.title: Scoring and Endgame
subtopics.content:
#### Win
- Cure all 3 diseases (you do NOT need to remove all cubes).

#### Lose
- **8 outbreaks** — Outbreak marker reaches 8.
- **Cubes depleted** — Can't place a cube when needed.
- **Player deck empty** — Can't draw 2 player cards.

subtopics.title: Beginner Tips
subtopics.content:
- **Communicate openly** — Share information about your cards and planned moves.
- **Prioritize hotspots** — Focus on cities with 3 cubes to prevent outbreaks.
- **Get cards together** — Share knowledge to collect matching colors for cures.
- **Treat cured diseases** — The Medic becomes much more efficient once a disease is cured.

subtopics.title: Key Strategies
subtopics.content:
- **Cure order** — Prioritize curing the most dangerous disease first.
- **Card management** — Plan trades so you're not wasting cards on flights.
- **Epidemic preparation** — After reshuffling the infection discard, recently infected cities will be hit again.
- **Role synergy** — Combine abilities for maximum efficiency.
